title: Employee Referral Program and Bonus Policy
text:
Q: What is the employee referral program and how does the bonus policy work?
A: Our Employee Referral Program encourages employees to refer qualified candidates for open positions within the company. If your referral is hired and completes at least 90 days of employment, you will receive a referral bonus of $1,000, which will be paid in your next paycheck following the completion of the 90-day period. To participate, please submit your referral's resume along with a completed referral form to the HR department via email at hr@company.com. Ensure that your referral mentions your name during the application process to qualify. The program is open for all positions except for executive roles and positions within the HR department. For any questions or additional information, please contact the HR team directly. We appreciate your help in building a strong team!
